## Issue success criteria
- ✅ External toolchain (not Cargo deps): no `charon`/`aeneas` in any `**/Cargo.toml` (repo search), while CI installs both externally (`.github/workflows/ci.yml:129-149`).
- ✅ `proofs/` scaffolding and explicit Mathlib dependency exist (`proofs/lean-toolchain:1`, `proofs/lakefile.lean:5-10`).
- ✅ End-to-end pipeline is implemented and wired in CI: Charon → Aeneas → `lake build` (`scripts/verify-lean.sh:24-39,52-56,73-75`; `.github/workflows/ci.yml:156-167`).
- ✅ `gfp/` + `gfpn/` translation evidence is present in generated Lean (`proofs/Gf2Core/Types.lean:114,132-156`; `proofs/Gf2Core/Funs.lean:767+`).
- ✅ Const-generic risk gate documented as working (no monomorphization fallback needed) (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md:55-57`).

## No technical debt
- ✅ Previously flagged documentation inconsistencies are resolved: `CLAUDE.md` now states `gfp/` and `gfpn/` are covered (`CLAUDE.md:62`), and `WORKAROUNDS.md` now marks `gfpn` as transparent/verified (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md:25,42-46`).
- ✅ Toolchain/source-of-truth is coherent across script/docs/CI (`scripts/verify-lean.sh:22`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml:127,134`, `dev/lean4-verification-pipeline.md:42-45`).

## No test or lint failures
- ✅ `cargo-ci` passed on current reviewed commit `b8e072...` (`.jit/gate-runs/30aedd4b-333e-4c88-b9dc-5564618e5424/result.json:4,7,9,13,16`), and it runs check+test+clippy `-D warnings`+fmt.
- ✅ `lake-build` gate is passing for this issue (`.jit/issues/886af072-ecdf-477a-9fc7-685a88d7abf5.json:31-35`; run evidence in `.jit/gate-runs/ff1c8bb2-a318-401c-b076-8a9e34e0e69a/result.json:4,9,13,16`).

## Separation of concerns
- ✅ Dependency direction is correct: `gf2-core` has no `gf2-coding` dependency (`crates/gf2-core/Cargo.toml:12-19`), while `gf2-coding` depends on `gf2-core` (`crates/gf2-coding/Cargo.toml:13`).

## Functional paradigm and performance
- ✅ Reviewed scope is infra/docs/CI/proofs plumbing; no hot-path GF(2) kernel changes were introduced.
- ✅ GF(2) performance conventions are unaffected by this delta.

## Correctness
- ✅ No `BitVec` mutator or bit-indexing implementation changes in this issue scope; tail-masking/bit-numbering invariants are not regressed.
- ✅ Formal-translation scope now demonstrably includes both prime and extension field modules (`Types.lean`/`Funs.lean` evidence above).

## Testing
- ✅ CI executes required Rust quality gates (`cargo-ci` command includes check/test/clippy/fmt) and currently passes.
- ✅ Lean proof compilation gate passes (`lake build` success artifact present).

## Unsafe isolation
- ✅ `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains in `gf2-core` and `gf2-coding` (`crates/gf2-core/src/lib.rs:35`, `crates/gf2-coding/src/lib.rs:8`).
- ✅ `unsafe` usage remains isolated to SIMD crate implementation files (matches in `crates/gf2-kernels-simd/**`), with non-SIMD mentions in core being comments only.

## Documentation
- ✅ Verification docs are present and materially complete (`dev/lean4-verification-pipeline.md`, `proofs/README.md`, `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md`) and align on `gfpn` verification and Mathlib dependency.
- ✅ Pipeline usage/regeneration instructions are explicit (`proofs/README.md:45-65`, `scripts/verify-lean.sh:12`).

## Prior review feedback (most recent run)
- ✅ Addressed: `CLAUDE.md` no longer claims `gfpn` is blocked.
- ✅ Addressed: `WORKAROUNDS.md` no longer semantically contradicts `gfpn` verification status.
- ✅ Addressed: test/lint/build evidence now exists via fresh passing gate artifacts for this issue’s current flow.

## Jit issue dependencies
- ✅ `issue.dependencies` is empty (`.jit/issues/886af072-ecdf-477a-9fc7-685a88d7abf5.json:8`); no prerequisite blockage.

VERDICT: PASS
